states.name: Bahamut
states.title: Dragon Maiden of Calamity
states.description: From time to time, the evil, calamity-bringing dragon would wreak destruction on towns across the land. So great was her power that people, filled with fear and awe, called her Bahamut, the "Winged Demon."

states.name: Bahamut
states.title: Dragon Maiden of Calamity
states.description: She slew countless dragon hunters and sought at last to bring the entire world under her dominion. But her ambition was suddenly crushed by the hand of the legendary dragonslayer, Siegfried. What became of her afterward, no one knows.

states.name: Bahamut
states.title: Dragon Maiden of Calamity
states.description: Near a remote village, deep within the forest, stands a small cottage. It is said that a woman and a young girl live there quietly. The girl is willful and unruly; the woman, slovenly yet kind. No one in the village knows who they truly are.
